title: FEMR Modular Architecture Redesign
subtitle: Concept-first split plan grounded in MOSAIC's original folder ownership: runner orchestrates rollout, algorithm updates losses, storage persists tensors, module defines policy behavior.

nodes.title: MOSAIC-style FEMR ownership boundary
nodes.role: 这张图是后续拆分的唯一概念入口。参考 MOSAIC 原本代码：runner 负责 rollout 编排，algorithm 负责 act/process_env_step/update 与 loss，storage 只保存 transition，module 只表达网络和动作语义。
nodes.input: 当前 OnPolicyRunner 中混合的 FEMR 初始化、恢复、rollout 证据、reward window、rho target、storage payload、diagnostic 和 runtime correction。
nodes.output: 按 MOSAIC 分层放回对应文件夹：env/command-facing helper 放 runners；loss/update 放 algorithms；buffer 字段放 storage；policy head/action conversion 放 modules。
nodes.forbidden: 不能为了减少行数而新建一套与 MOSAIC 无关的体系；不能把 storage 写成 target 计算器；不能让 algorithm 回头访问 env 或 command_manager。
nodes.diagnostic: 每次迁移后检查：config flag -> rollout construction -> transition payload -> RolloutStorage minibatch -> FrontRESUnified loss -> diagnostics。
nodes.lines: MOSAIC reference: algorithms/mosaic.py 722-852; algorithms/frontres_unified.py 387-438; storage/rollout_storage.py 13-235; modules/front_residual_actor_critic.py 175-188

children.title: MOSAIC reference: Algorithm owns transition API
children.role: MOSAIC/PPO/FrontRESUnified 的共同模式是 algorithm.act 写 transition.actions/value/log_prob，algorithm.process_env_step 写 reward/done 并调用 storage.add_transitions，algorithm.update 消费 minibatch 并更新参数。
children.forbidden: algorithm.update 不能读取 env 当前 command；runner 不应该直接实现 loss。
children.diagnostic: 如果某块代码需要 optimizer、minibatch、loss weight 或梯度边界，它属于 algorithms/。

children.title: OnPolicyRunner keeps rollout orchestration only
children.role: Runner 应保留训练循环、obs 获取与归一化、env.step、split-env 索引、调用 alg.act/process_env_step/compute_returns/update、save/load/log/eval 入口。Rollout step preparation、joint warmup phase、reward/evidence context、post-step reward/evidence connector、episode bookkeeping、fixed-DR sweep evaluator、supervised controller 与 runtime temporal-cache helpers 已拆出，但 PPO env.step 主循环仍留在 runner 内。
children.input: env、train_cfg、policy/algorithm/storage 实例、各 FEMR runner helper 返回的 payload，包括 pre-step action/env_action plan、warmup phase completion state、post-step reward/evidence result、episode bookkeeping buffers 和 fixed-DR eval results。
children.output: 按阶段调用 helper，并把 actions/env_actions、transition payload、rewards 或 done masks 交给 env.step、self.alg.process_env_step 与 runner service helpers。
children.forbidden: 不再直接展开 FEMR reward、oracle、rho target、action cone、checkpoint、runtime correction、pre-step action rewrite、reward/evidence context、post-step reward/evidence connector、episode buffer bookkeeping 或大段 diagnostics。
children.diagnostic: OnPolicyRunner 中 FEMR 逻辑应逐步收缩为 component calls 和 payload wiring；pre-step action/mask/env_action preparation 已由 FrontRESRolloutStepPlan 承接，joint warmup 已由 run_frontres_joint_warmup 承接，reward/evidence context 已由 build_frontres_reward_context 承接，post-step reward/evidence connector 已由 apply_frontres_post_step_reward_connector 承接，post-step episode bookkeeping 已由 update_episode_bookkeeping 承接，fixed-DR sweep eval 已由 run_frontres_dr_sweep_eval 承接，supervised controller 已由 update_frontres_supervised_controller 承接，runtime temporal-cache invalidation 已直接调用 frontres_runtime helper。
children.lines: source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/runners/on_policy_runner.py eval wrapper 494-508, learn entry 510, temporal cache invalidation 855, HSL rollout target call 873-884, reward context call 912-940, post-step connector call 1114-1131, supervised controller call 1245-1250; current 1449 lines; source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/runners/frontres_dr_sweep_eval.py 1-335; source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/runners/frontres_rollout_step.py 1-363; source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/runners/frontres_post_step_connector.py 1-213; source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/runners/frontres_episode_bookkeeping.py 1-130

children.title: RolloutStorage remains passive persistence
children.role: Storage 按 MOSAIC 原本边界只声明 Transition 字段、分配 tensor、copy transition、flatten/yield minibatch。它不判断样本好坏，也不构造 target。审计结论：FrontRES 采用 MOSAIC append-only tuple contract，保持 MOSAIC base tuple 0-18 不变，只在后面追加 FrontRES 专属字段。
children.input: algorithm.transition 中已经构造好的 tensors。MOSAIC base fields: obs、critic_obs、actions、values、advantages、returns、old_log_prob、old_mu/sigma、hidden/masks、rnd、teacher/ref_vel/motion_groups、frontres_mask、supervised_target。FrontRES append fields: frontres_actor_gate、supervised_weight、supervised_harm_weight、acceptance_target/mask、state_alpha_target/mask。
children.output: 稳定 minibatch tuple fields，供 FrontRESUnified.update 解包。FrontRESUnified 当前按 batch[:26] 解包；普通 generator 在 yield_batch_indices=True 时追加 batch_idx 作为第 26 项，不改变前 26 项顺序。
children.forbidden: 不能在 add_transitions 或 generator 中改变 FEMR 语义、重新计算 reward、筛选 actor gate 或生成 rho target；不能在 FrontRES 中插入字段到 MOSAIC base tuple 中间，只能 append；不能让 storage 读取 env evidence。
children.diagnostic: 如果某块代码只需要 shape、copy、flatten、tuple order，它属于 storage/；如果需要 env evidence，它不属于 storage/。当前对齐：RolloutStorage.add_transitions 只 copy transition 字段，mini_batch_generator 保持 MOSAIC 0-18 顺序，FrontRES 19-25 追加字段与 FrontRESUnified._update_ppo_supervised 解包一致。注意：recurrent_mini_batch_generator 也提供 FrontRES append fields，但 FrontRESActorCritic 当前 is_recurrent=False；未来若引入 recurrent FrontRES，需重新审计 batch_idx/smooth-loss 路径。
children.lines: source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/storage/rollout_storage.py Transition 13-60, allocation/copy 62-235, mini_batch_generator 316-459, recurrent_mini_batch_generator 467-587; source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/algorithms/mosaic.py tuple unpack 1000-1014; source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/algorithms/frontres_unified.py tuple unpack 508-538

children.title: FrontRESActorCritic owns policy expression
children.role: Module 只定义网络结构、action distribution、task-space output、log_prob、get_env_action 的动作语义。它不应读取 rollout reward 或构造学习标签。
children.input: policy observations、critic observations、residual/action-head config、GMT policy checkpoint。
children.output: sampled FrontRES action、action mean/std/log_prob、GMT-composed robot action。
children.forbidden: 不能访问 env.command_manager、dones、infos、RolloutStorage 或 optimizer step。
children.diagnostic: 如果某块代码改变 action head、rho/alpha head、bounded action 或 log_prob，它属于 modules/。

children.title: FrontRESUnified owns loss and gradient boundary
children.role: FrontRESUnified 保持 algorithm owner：读取 storage minibatch 和 runner 写入的 payload，组合 PPO、supervised、state-alpha、structured-rho losses，并执行 optimizer step。
children.forbidden: 不能回头访问 env 或 motion command；不能重新构造 rollout evidence；不能把 runtime correction 混入 update。

children.title: FrontRES rollout evidence stays in runners
children.role: Noisy、Candidate、Projected、Feasible 分支依赖 env step 后的 command state、split-env block、dones、infos 和 executable scorer，因此属于 runners/ 的 rollout-time helper。
children.forbidden: 不能写 optimizer；不能在 storage 中计算；不能把 evaluator-only oracle 当成 actor-caused action。

children.title: FrontRES executable utility stays in runners
children.role: Executable utility 是 rollout 证据的评分器和 score-space floor 校准器：它读取 command 中的 anchor/body/foot/robot state，为 runner 构造 reward/evidence 提供分数，并维护 GMT executable floor 的 runner-state 读写。
children.input: motion command、active mode groups、GMT frontier state、feasible branch state。
children.output: planar/vertical/xy/yaw/z/rp/task score、mode-selected score、feasible oracle score、executable floor/safe floor/source。
children.forbidden: 不生成 policy action，不写 storage，不组合 loss。
children.diagnostic: exec planar/vertical/task、feasible oracle score、floor source；resolve_runner_executable_floor 与 update_runner_executable_floor_stats 已落地，负责 runner 上的 safe/broken EMA、last floor diagnostics 和 score floor 返回；runner 内 exec scorer facade 已清空，reward window 和 warmup 直接使用 runner._frontres_executability。
children.lines: source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/runners/frontres_executability.py; source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/runners/frontres_executable_floor.py state/value 13-30, runner resolve/update helpers 198-238; source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/runners/frontres_reward_window.py direct executability calls 328-356; source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/runners/frontres_warmup.py direct executability calls 207-226

children.title: FrontRES reward window becomes runner payload builder
children.role: Reward window 把 damage gap/reward evidence 转成 safe/repair/broken gates、exec/cost/actor weights 和 r_delta components；post-step connector 再把这些分量接成 process_env_step 前的 final rewards、diagnostic accumulation 与 previous residual reset。它们仍在 env step 与 process_env_step 之间，所以属于 runners/。
children.forbidden: 不能把 actor_gate 的含义藏进 algorithm loss；不能让 broken samples 主导 actor update。
children.diagnostic: safe/repair/broken frac、actor/exec/cost weight、train_reward、effective_gain_bonus、harm_rate；FrontRESRewardContext 已落地，负责 env.step 后的 quartet index、clean/noisy/projected anchor geometry、r_step/r_rescue、exec/feasible scores、rollout evidence gain、oracle upper bound、executable floor、candidate floor pass、stable route mask 和 action/clean-bound costs；FrontRESRewardWindow 负责 damage_gap、oracle_trust、repair_ratio、double-sigmoid window、actor_gate、exec/cost weights、harm_penalty、effective_gain_bonus、ranking reward 和 final r_delta composition；frontres_family_gain_std 已落地，负责 family-preference reward 的 per-family EMA std；post-step reward/evidence connector 已落地，负责 reward overwrite、smooth/reg shaping、diagnostic accumulation、termination counters 与 previous residual reset；本次审计新增接口契约：task-space reward/evidence 必须有 clean anchor evidence，否则 runner 直接报错；非 task-space 旧分支保留 quartet split 索引并走 baseline r_delta。reward diagnostic final mean materialization 已移入 FrontRES reward diagnostics。
children.lines: source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/runners/frontres_reward_window.py family gain helper 145-209, reward context 211-533, direct executability calls 328-356, family preference call 667; source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/runners/frontres_post_step_connector.py 1-213; source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/runners/on_policy_runner.py reward context call 912-940, reward context unpack/payload 942-1113, connector call 1114-1131; reward diagnostic final mean materialization moved to frontres_reward_diagnostics.py 17-399

children.title: ActionCone and HSL rollout targets stay in runners
children.role: Action cone 与 HSL rollout label 根据当前 command、perturbation family 和 active task dims 构造监督目标；这是 rollout-time target construction，不是 network 或 loss。
children.input: frontres_active_task_dims、mode groups、task-space target、motion command correction snapshots。
children.forbidden: 不能采样或监督当前 action cone 不能修复的维度；不能在 module 中读取 command_manager。
children.diagnostic: active mask、valid_pos/valid_rpy、diag_valid_axes、HSL target nonzero/mask；FrontRESHSLRolloutTarget 已落地，负责 Clean/Noisy/FEMR rollout state -> supervised_target/supervised_weight/supervised_harm_weight；runner 内 action cone/HSL wrapper 已清空，rollout step、warmup、transition payload 和 HSL rollout target 直接调用 runner._frontres_action_cone。
children.lines: source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/runners/frontres_action_cone.py project/mask 20-100; source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/runners/frontres_hsl_rollout_target.py action cone calls 95 and 102; source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/runners/frontres_rollout_step.py supervised target action cone calls 199-210; source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/runners/frontres_transition_payload.py mode_dim_mask call 919-922; source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/runners/frontres_warmup.py warmup target projection 203; source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/runners/on_policy_runner.py HSL rollout target call 909-920

children.title: Alpha-rho payload is runner-to-algorithm bridge
children.role: Alpha/rho payload 把 rollout evidence 转成 algorithm.transition 字段。它属于 runners/，因为它发生在 env.step 后、storage.add_transitions 前；它只写 payload，不更新参数。
children.input: actor_gate、state-alpha evidence、rho current、structured rho carrier inputs、active dim masks。
children.forbidden: 不能计算 loss；不能替代 RolloutStorage；不能访问 optimizer 或 minibatch。
children.diagnostic: state_alpha target/mask、rho target planar/rp/z、grouped_rho_mask、structured_joint adv/weight；FrontRESAcceptancePayload、FrontRESTriAnchorRhoPayload、FrontRESNonTriAcceptanceTargetPayload 和 FrontRESStructuredRhoPayload 已落地。build_and_write_frontres_acceptance_payload 现在统一编排默认 payload、last-step diagnostics reset、rho_current 读取、tri-anchor/grouped rho target、非 tri-anchor direct/legacy acceptance target、mode/active-dim mask、structured rho carrier 调用、post-target preference summary、transition.acceptance_target/mask 写回。

children.title: Warmup and perturbation curriculum stay in runners
children.role: Warmup、DR scale、perturbation family mix 和 boundary/frontier controller 直接操作 env perturbation hooks，并决定下一次 rollout 的数据分布，因此属于 runners/。
children.input: resume iteration、warmup config、frontier stats、active task dims、env perturbation hooks。
children.forbidden: 不能在 resume 后重跑已完成 warmup；不能采样 action cone 无法修复的扰动族。
children.diagnostic: warmup mode_mix、dr_scale、valid axes、frontier safe/repair/broken；FrontRES warmup 已落地，负责 joint supervised/energy warmup 的采样、actor/critic warmup optimizer、warmup diagnostics 与 warmup checkpoint，并直接使用 runner._frontres_executability 计算 warmup energy target；FrontRES training setup / perturbation setup 已落地，负责 mode/objective 解析、debug training override、PPO actor takeover weight、supervised controller decay、split-env pair layout、task action mask、DR/frontier state 初始化、perturbation target snapshot、perturbation curriculum choices、per-env family masks、scalar/per-env DR strength sampling、perturber scale 写入和 iteration-level DR controller plan。
children.lines: source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/runners/frontres_warmup.py 1-641, direct executability calls 207-226; source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/runners/frontres_training_setup.py ppo weight 163-190, supervised controller 193-241, pair layout 243-304, iteration DR controller 693-804; source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/runners/on_policy_runner.py supervised controller call 1245-1250

children.title: Runtime correction stays in runners
children.role: Inference policy、task-space correction 写入、stable/tri route runtime、temporal cache 和 restore debug 都在部署/rollout 编排边界上工作，因此属于 runners/。
children.input: policy correction、motion command term、active task dims、alpha/rho route state、temporal reference cache、debug tensors。
children.output: corrected command reference、inference policy callable、temporal cache updates、restore debug prints。
children.forbidden: 不能改变 algorithm.update；不能把 evaluator oracle credit 写成 runtime actor credit。
children.diagnostic: runtime correction applied、temporal cache reset、restore debug sample vectors；raw anchor pose、stabilizing candidate、temporal continuity candidate、temporal cache update/invalidate 已直接保留在 frontres_runtime.py，runner 内对应 _frontres_* wrapper 已清空；runner 仅保留 _apply_frontres_task_corrections 与 _maybe_print_frontres_restore_debug 作为兼容入口。
children.lines: source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/runners/frontres_runtime.py apply corrections 111-354, raw pose 356-378, stable candidate 380-422, temporal continuity 424-491, cache update/invalidate 493-535, restore debug 539-949; source/rsl_rl/rsl_rl/runners/on_policy_runner.py runtime entry wrappers 1332-1362

children.title: Checkpoint and log are runner services
children.role: Checkpoint/resume、episode bookkeeping、fixed-DR sweep eval、reward diagnostics accumulation、final metric mean materialization 与 log 是 runner service：它们保存或展示 runner/algorithm/module/storage 状态，但不定义训练语义。
children.input: runner state、policy/optimizer state_dict、normalizer state、loss_dict、episode buffers、diagnostic accumulators、eval dr_scales。
children.output: save/load/probe-best checkpoint、episode return/length buffers、fixed-DR eval json/csv、TensorBoard scalars、console sections。
children.forbidden: 不能在 logging 中重新计算训练 target；不能在 checkpoint 中改变 resume 语义。
children.diagnostic: resume cold/full path、FrontRES warmup complete、floor/frontier state、episode return/length buffers、fixed-DR FrontRES-vs-GMT sweep、reward diagnostic sums/means、console scalar consistency。

children.title: Next split order follows MOSAIC boundaries
children.role: 后续拆分顺序不按行数最大优先，而按边界清晰度优先：先 runner payload/reward/evidence helper，再清理 storage tuple contract，最后才考虑 algorithm loss 内部再分函数。
children.input: 当前 OnPolicyRunner live path 和短跑测试诊断。
children.output: 小步迁移，每步 py_compile + architecture 更新 + diagnostics 对齐。
children.forbidden: 不能一刀切搬 learn() 主体；不能先改训练行为再补 diagnostics；不能因为想减少图数量而丢失概念边界。
children.diagnostic: 已完成：HSL rollout target helper、非 tri-anchor direct/legacy acceptance target、structured rho carrier connector、post-target preference summary、reward window gates/weights/ranking/final r_delta composition、reward/evidence context、post-step reward/evidence connector、FrontRES reward diagnostics accumulation/final mean materialization、FrontRES training setup / perturbation setup、supervised controller、perturbation control、iteration-level DR controller、rollout action/mask/env_action preparation、joint warmup loop、post-step episode bookkeeping、fixed-DR sweep evaluator、executable floor runner-state helper、family gain stats、action cone/HSL rollout target wrappers、runtime temporal-cache wrappers、exec scorer facade 迁入 runners helpers。本次审计已收口 task-space clean evidence 契约。建议下一步：暂停拆分，做 FrontRES live-path 集成审计。
children.lines: completed: on_policy_runner.py old HSL rollout target -> frontres_hsl_rollout_target.py 17-150 and direct call 873-884; old 3895-3976, old 4003-4114, and post-target preference summary -> frontres_transition_payload.py 17-1109; old 3421-3702 and old 3995-4029 plus reward/evidence context/family gain stats/direct exec scorer calls -> frontres_reward_window.py 17-893; old executable floor runner-state helpers -> frontres_executable_floor.py 198-238; old post-step reward/evidence connector -> frontres_post_step_connector.py 1-213; old 4084-4339 and old 4490 final means -> frontres_reward_diagnostics.py 17-399; old FrontRES setup, supervised controller, perturbation control, and iteration DR controller blocks -> frontres_training_setup.py 17-1121; old rollout action/mask/env_action preparation plus direct action cone calls -> frontres_rollout_step.py 1-363; old joint warmup loop plus direct action cone/exec scorer calls -> frontres_warmup.py 1-641; old post-step episode bookkeeping -> frontres_episode_bookkeeping.py 1-130; old fixed-DR sweep eval plus direct runtime cache invalidation -> frontres_dr_sweep_eval.py 1-335; old runtime temporal-cache wrappers -> frontres_runtime.py 356-535; next candidate: FrontRES live-path integration audit
